name: django-pfx

metadata.name: django-pfx
metadata.summary: Django PFX is a toolkit designed to streamline the development of RESTful APIs using the Django framework.

documentation:
# Django PFX

[![pipeline status](https://gitlab.com/pfx4/django-pfx/badges/master/pipeline.svg)](https://gitlab.com/pfx4/django-pfx/-/commits/master)
[![coverage report](https://gitlab.com/pfx4/django-pfx/badges/master/coverage.svg)](https://pfx4.gitlab.io/django-pfx/coverage)

![logo]

Django PFX is a toolkit designed to streamline the development of RESTful APIs
using the Django framework, leveraging views and the ORM (Object-Relational Mapping).
With a focus on simplicity and efficiency, Django PFX enables developers to rapidly
create robust web service APIs for web applications and simplifies the testing process.

> From version 1.3 PFX is only compatible with Django 4.2 LTS,
> please use version 1.2 for older Django versions.

### Key Features:
- Predefined CRUD API (but customizable)
- Internationalization
- Authentication & Authorization
- JSON-only RESTful API
- Flexibility
- Tests & Profiling Tools
- Automatic Open API Documentation

### Links
- [Source](https://gitlab.com/pfx4/django-pfx)
- [Issue tracker](https://gitlab.com/pfx4/django-pfx/-/issues)
- [Documentation](https://pfx4.gitlab.io/django-pfx/doc/)

[logo]: https://gitlab.com/pfx4/django-pfx/-/raw/master/img/pfx.png "PFX"

This file only contains a selection of the most common options. For a full

add these directories to sys.path here. If the directory is relative to the
documentation root, use os.path.abspath to make it absolute, like shown here.

Override validate_unique to allow to customize error message

A model mixin to improve mode validation errors.

functions.name: pfx.pfxcore.middleware.locale.get_language_from_request
documentation:
Custom version of django `get_language_from_request` from translation.

Remove path and cookies parsing and just use `X-Custom-language` as
first choice if it is defined and valid, then use `Accept-Language`.

```
param request

The HTTP request.

type request

HttpRequest

return

The language code.

rtype

str
```

functions.name: pfx.pfxcore.middleware.locale.get_timezone_from_request
documentation:
Get the timezone from request.

If `X-Custom-Timezone` is defined in request headers and is valid (exists
in `pytz.all_timezones_set`), it is returned. Otherwise, the default
timezone (from DJango) is returned.

```
param request

The HTTP request.

type request

HttpRequest

return

The request timezone.

rtype

str
```

classes.name: pfx.pfxcore.middleware.locale.LocaleMiddleware
documentation:
A middleware to load locale data from request.

* `request.LANGUAGE_CODE` is set from `get_language_from_request`.
* `request.TIMEZONE` is set from `get_timezone_from_request`.
* `Content-Language` is set in the response headers to specify the used
  language.

classes.name: pfx.pfxcore.middleware.authentication.AuthenticationMiddleware
documentation:
A middleware to authenticate with a bearer token.

If `Authorization` is defined in request headers and the value is
a valid JWT token (in the `"Bearer $TOKEN"` format), use it to
set `request.user`. Otherwise, set it with
`django.contrib.auth.models.AnonymousUser()`.

classes.name: pfx.pfxcore.middleware.authentication.CookieAuthenticationMiddleware
documentation:
A middleware to authenticate with a cookie.

If `token` is defined in cookies and the value is
a valid JWT token, use it to set `request.user`.
Otherwise, set it with
`django.contrib.auth.models.AnonymousUser()`.

If the token is not valid, delete the cookie.

If `request.delete_cookie` is `True` after the processing,
delete the cookie.

classes.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.parameters.list_items.ListItems
documentation:
List of objects in response (`items`).

* if `true` (default value), `items` is returned
* if `false`, `items` is not returned

If `count` attribute is set, the default value is `false`.

classes.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.parameters.meta_orders.MetaOrders
documentation:
if `true`, `orders` list is returned in response.

if one query parameter is set, the default value is `false`.

classes.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.parameters.subset_page.SubsetPage
documentation:
The page number to query in `pagination` mode.

If the value of `subset` is not `"pagination"`, this attribute will
be ignored.

classes.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.parameters.meta_fields.MetaFields
documentation:
if `true`, `fields` list is returned in response.

if one query parameter is set, the default value is `false`.

classes.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.parameters.subset_offset.SubsetOffset
documentation:
The first object index to retrieve in `offset` mode.

If the value of `subset` is not `"offset"`, this attribute will
be ignored.

classes.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.parameters.subset.Subset
documentation:
Subset mode for objects list.

* if `null` (default value), you receive a list of objects
without subsets management.
* if `"pagination"`, you receive a list of objects
with pagination management (see parameters:
`page`, `page_size`, `page_subset`). The following attributes are add
to `meta.subset` in response :
    * `page` : the page number
    * `page_size` : the max number of objets per pages
    * `count` : the total number of objects
    * `page_count` : the total number of pages
    * `subset` : a limited list of page numbers (for paginator)
    * `page_subset` : max number of pages in `subset`
* if `"offset"`, you receive a list of objects. The following attributes
are add to `meta.subset` in response :
    * `count` : the total number of objects
    * `page_count` : the total number of pages
    * `limit` : the max number of objets in result
    * `offset` : the first object index in result
with offset management (see parameters: `page_size`)

The `PFX_MAX_LIST_RESULT_SIZE` will always be applied is set to limit
the result list size.

classes.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.parameters.subset_page_subset.SubsetPageSubset
documentation:
The maximum number of pages in `pagination` mode.

The maximum numb of pages in `meta.subset.subset` element.

If the value of `subset` is not `"pagination"`, this attribute will
be ignored.

classes.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.parameters.date_format.DateFormat
documentation:
Date format option.

* if `false` (default value), date fields will be returned
as ISO 8601 string.
* if `true`, date fields will be returned as a JSON object with
2 attributes:
    * `value`: the ISO 8601 string
    * `formatted`: a string representation
    (short format using the request locale)

classes.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.parameters.meta_filters.MetaFilters
documentation:
if `true`, `filters` list is returned in response.

if one query parameter is set, the default value is `false`.

classes.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.parameters.list_search.ListSearch
documentation:
Filter result by a text search.

Apply the default text search (object-dependent).

classes.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.parameters.subset_page_size.SubsetPageSize
documentation:
The maximum number of objects in `pagination` mode.

If the value of `subset` is not `"pagination"`, this attribute will
be ignored.

If `page_size` > `PFX_MAX_LIST_RESULT_SIZE`, `PFX_MAX_LIST_RESULT_SIZE`
will be applied.

classes.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.parameters.subset_limit.SubsetLimit
documentation:
The maximum number of objects in `offset` mode.

If the value of `subset` is not `"offset"`, this attribute will
be ignored.

If `limit` > `PFX_MAX_LIST_RESULT_SIZE`, `PFX_MAX_LIST_RESULT_SIZE`
will be applied.

classes.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.parameters.list_mode.ListMode
documentation:
Mode of result list.

* If `"list"` (default value): Full object representation for lists.
* If `"select"`: Minimal object representation for select widget.

classes.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.parameters.list_order.ListOrder
documentation:
Control the order of objects in result.

A comma separated list of field, optionally prefixed by :
* `+` (default) : in ascending order.
* `-` : in descending order.

Exemple: `order=-date,name` (`order=-date,+name` is equivalent).

The list of usable fields can be found in `/meta/list` service response.

classes.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.parameters.media_redirect.MediaRedirect
documentation: if `true`, make a redirect, otherwise return the file URL.

classes.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.parameters.list_count.ListCount
documentation:
Total objects count in response (`meta.count`).

* if `false` (default value), `meta.count` is not returned
* if `true`, `meta.count` is returned

If this attribute is set, `items` will be returned only if
`items` attribute is explicitly `true`.

methods.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.locale_views.LocaleRestView.locales
documentation:
Entrypoint for {code}`GET /languages` route.

Returns the list of available languages.

```
returns

The JSON response

rtype

```

\---
get:

> summary: Get languages
> responses:
>
> > 200:
> > : content:
> >   : application/json:
> >     : schema:
> >       : properties:
> >         : items:
> >
> >           : type: array
> >             items:
> >
> >             > type: object
> >             > properties:
> >             >
> >             > > pk:
> >             > >
> >             > > : type: string
> >             > >
> >             > > name:
> >             > >
> >             > > : type: string
> >
> >           meta:
> >
> >           : type: object
> >             properties:
> >
> >             > count:
> >             >
> >             > : type: number
The view to get locale data.

classes.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.authentication_views.AuthenticationView

Raise the error for login error.

methods.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.authentication_views.AuthenticationView.login
documentation:
Entrypoint for {code}`POST /login` route.

Use the request body to authenticate the user using
the username and password attributes.

```
returns

The JSON response

rtype

```

\---
post:

> summary: Login
> description: A login rest services with a `mode` parameter to
>
> > choose between JWT bearer token or cookie authentication.
> > In cookie mode, the JWT token is saved in an HTTP-only cookie.
>
> requestBody:
> : content:
>   : application/json:
>     : schema:
>       : properties:
>         : username:
>
>           : type: string
>
>           password:
>
>           : type: string
>             format: password
>
>           remember_me:
>
>           : description: If true, use a long validity
>
>             : token to keep the user logged in
>               for a long time.
>
>             type: boolean
>
> parameters:
> : - in: query
>     name: mode
>     schema:
>
>     > type: string
>     > enum: ['jwt', 'cookie']
>     > default: 'jwt'

methods.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.authentication_views.AuthenticationView.logout
documentation:
Entrypoint for {code}`GET /logout` route.

```
returns

The JSON response

rtype

```

\---
get:

> summary: Logout
> description: A service that deletes the authentication cookie
>
> > if it exists.

methods.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.authentication_views.AuthenticationView.change_password
documentation:
Entrypoint for {code}`POST /change-password` route.

```
returns

The JSON response

rtype
```

\---
post:

> summary: Change password

>

>
> requestBody:

>     : schema:
>       : properties:
>         : old_password:
>
>           : description: the user's current password
>             type: string
>             format: password
>
>           new_password:
>
>           : description: the user's future password
>             type: string
>             format: password

methods.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.authentication_views.AuthenticationView.get_extra_payload
documentation:
Get extra payload for user token.

By default, there is only one private claim in the JWT token
(the user PK : pfx_user_pk). This method can be overridden
to add claims (key:value attributes) to the JWT token.

```
param user

The user

returns

The extra payload

rtype

```

methods.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.authentication_views.AuthenticationView.get_user_information

Get the user representation in the view.

Can be overridden to customize result.

```
param user

The user
```

methods.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.authentication_views.AuthenticationView.get_user_information_schema
documentation:
Get user representation schema.

Can be overridden to customize result.

methods.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.authentication_views.AuthenticationView.validate_user_token
documentation:
Entrypoint for {code}`POST /validate-user-token` route.

Validate the uid and the set/reset password token contained
in self.request.body.

```
returns

The JSON response

rtype

```

\---
post:

> summary: Validate user token
> description: Validate the uidb64 and
>
> > the token sent in the set/reset password link.
>
> requestBody:
> : content:
>   : application/json:
>     : schema:
>       : properties:
>         : uidb64:
>
>           : type: string
>             description: the uid in base64 sent in
>
>             > the set/reset password link
>
>           token:
>
>           : type: string
>             description: the reset password token
>
>             > sent in the set/reset password link

methods.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.authentication_views.AuthenticationView.set_password
documentation:
Entrypoint for {code}`POST /set-password` route.

Set the password if the base64 uid and the set/reset password
token are valid. Password, uid and set/reset password token are
retrieved in self.request.body

```
returns

The JSON response

rtype

```

\---
post:

> summary: Set password
> description: A service for setting the password using a UID and
>
> > a token provided in the email sent by the "forgotten password"
> >
> > : or "sign up" services.
>
> requestBody:
> : content:
>   : application/json:
>     : schema:
>       : properties:
>         : uidb64:
>
>           : type: string
>             description: the uid in base64 sent in
>
>             > the set/reset password link
>
>           token:
>
>           : type: string
>             description: the reset password token sent
>
>             > in the set/reset password link
>
>           password:
>
>           : description: the new password
>             type: string
>             format: password
>
>           autologin:
>
>           : description: Automatically logs the user in
>
>             : upon successful authentication,
>               utilizing the value of this property
>               as the login mode.
>
>             type: string
>             enum: ['jwt', 'cookie']

methods.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.authentication_views.ForgottenPasswordView.forgotten_password
documentation:
Entrypoint for {code}`POST /forgotten-password` route.

Request a link to reset the password.
Send an e-mail to the provided email address in the post body
if it exits with a link to change the user password.

```
returns

The JSON response

rtype

```

\---
post:

> summary: Forgotten password
> description: Request an e-mail with a link
>
> > to change the user password.
>
> requestBody:
> : content:
>   : application/json:
>     : schema:
>       : properties:
>         : email:
>
>           : description: the user's email address
>             type: string
View for forgotten password service.

methods.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.rest_views.ModelResponseMixin.is_valid
documentation:
Persist an object instance changes and build default response.

The default response contains the serialized instance after save and
a text message.

You can use {code}`rel_data` to pass values to set on related fields
after instance is persisted (to avoid errors if the instance does
not exists in database).

```
param obj

The object instance

param created

If object instance is created

param rel_data

Values to set on related fields

returns

The JSON response

rtype

```

methods.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.rest_views.ModelBodyMixin.get_model_data
documentation:
Process data for object update or creation.

Return a tuple of data and rel_data. The returned data contains
only fields that can be modified in this context (create or update).

Values are deserialized according to field definition. If the field
il a related object list, the value is set in rel_data.

```
returns

The data and rel_data

rtype

```

methods.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.rest_views.ListRestViewMixin.get_list_fields
documentation:
Return the processed field list for lists.

Return a list of {class}`ViewField` built from {code}`cls.list_fields`
(or {code}`cls.fields` if {code}`cls.list_fields` is empty).

the result is cached on the class, to ensure that the build
is carried out no more than once per request.

```
returns

The fields list

rtype

```

methods.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.rest_views.ListRestViewMixin.search_filter
documentation:
Return the django filters for the default text search.

This default implementation returns empty filters, which will always
produce empty results. This method is designed to be implemented
by the view to be customized.

```
returns

The django filters

rtype

```

classes.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.rest_views.SecuredRestViewMixin

methods.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.rest_views.SecuredRestViewMixin.perm
documentation:
Check default permissions for all services.

Can be overloaded to customize behavior.

If this method returns {code}`False`, the access is always denied.
Otherwise custom checks of the service are performed.

methods.name: pfx.pfxcore.views.rest_views.SecuredRestViewMixin.check_perm
documentation:
Check permissions for a specific service.

Do all checks for a specific service and raise
{class}`UnauthorizedError` or {class}`ForbiddenError` if needed.

```
param public

The object pk

param field

The field name
```

A view mixin to manage service permissions.

You can add {code}`${func_name}_public` class attributes to override
{code}`default_public` value for specifics methods. This attribute has
precedence over the {code}`public` attribute of the {code}`@rest_api`
decorator, then you can override the behavior in an inherited view
without overriding the entrypoint method.

You can add {code}`${func_name}_perm` method to customize permissions
checks for a dedicated service.
